deployment: helm (hosted production, rev 92) — hosted-compat FORK build of the v0.12.15 release: vexaai/v012-meeting-api:0.12.15-260719-hc13 (image sha256:771879e3ed84c5c4df27278b10018d35cc8c69237f76530fba038ba37bac5ce6). NOTE: prod runs the hosted-compat fork, not the public vexaai/vexa-lite:v0.12.15; this receipt witnesses the fork build in production, corroborated by the public :v0.12.15 lite/bot images having passed release-validate.

witness_deployment.provisioned_by: delivered to production via helm rev 92 (hosted-compat fork build 0.12.15-260719-hc13), serving real users continuously since the cutover 2026-07-19 ~12:12 UTC
prevalidated: prod value at scale: 8 completed meetings since cutover, all 8 carrying the segments_captured transcript-delivery marker (real users, real transcripts)

storm validation (2026-07-19 ~20:00 UTC, same image on staging + prod unauth surface): auth wall 16/16, tenant isolation (IDOR) 403, typed refusals 422 across bad inputs, per-user max-bots cap race-safe (7 concurrent → 5x201+2x429), control plane held under a spawn storm (health steady ~0.55s), Redis pod-kill survived with 0 restarts, gateway pod-kill zero-blip, 21 over-capacity meetings reconciled requested->failed
prod-health watchdog 89 samples/12 min during the storm: /health 530-671ms == baseline, meeting-api 3/3 every sample — the storm never degraded prod
bounded live prod spawn+teardown: 3 bots spawned, capacity-reserve preempted a placeholder for an instant slot, DELETE tore them down, placeholder self-healed 2/2

values.title: feat(terminal): configurable default bot name
feat(bot): fail-fast control-plane reachability gate — infra faults exit 3 with named channels, never an opaque crashloop (#530)
fix(msteams): leave fallbacks were dead — ':has-text()' through querySelector; canonical clicker hoisted to shared, gate covers the Teams array (#759)
release: v0.12.12 witness receipt — SIGNED
governance: four D-book amendments from the v0.12.12 retro — sha-pinned TAKE, one re-stamp rule, mechanism-vs-tree closure, era-stamped intake (#785)
fix(zoom): wire createZoomSpeakers — Zoom transcripts carry who spoke (#538)
fix(gmeet): auth guard pinned by a running test + i18n-safe signed-out lobby detection (#756, #757)
fix(msteams): wire speaker name hints to the transcriber — segments carry who spoke (#498)
feat(bots): authenticated session lifecycle — provisioning end-to-end + write-back on teardown (#724, #725)
sec(deps): adm-zip >=0.6.0 via override — Dependabot high closed at the resolution layer (#773)
fix(meeting-api): POST /bots derives native_meeting_id from meeting_url or refuses typed 422 — no more orphan meetings (#792)
values.pass: malformed/missing native_meeting_id is refused typed and never leaves an orphan meeting row
values.observation: Storm 2026-07-19: POST /bots missing platform/native_meeting_id → HTTP 422. Oversized (>255) and NUL-byte native_meeting_id crashed the INSERT (see finding F1) but ATOMICALLY — zero orphan rows verified in the DB. The no-orphan guarantee holds even on that crash.

values.title: fix(merge-card): concurrency group scoped per trigger event — cross-event runs never cancel each other (#798)
fix(meeting-api): shared-meetings list — UNION-split access branches + per-branch indexes (#800)
chart: probe timeoutSeconds=5 across app services — 1s default probe-kills busy-but-healthy async workers (#802)
values.pass: app-service probes use timeoutSeconds=5 so a busy-but-healthy async worker is not probe-killed
values.observation: Prod 2026-07-19: deployed meeting-api startupProbe/readinessProbe/livenessProbe all timeoutSeconds=5 (kubectl-read from the live Deployment).

values.title: harden: bot callback horizon ~0.6s→7.5s + completed-meeting delivery marker (#806, #807)
values.pass: completed meetings carry the segments_captured delivery marker (the extended callback horizon lands)
values.observation: Prod 2026-07-19 since cutover: 8 completed meetings, ALL 8 carrying the data->segments_captured delivery marker (real-user value at scale on the delivered image).

values.title: docs: truthful value claims — Teams/Zoom speaker bullets corrected to wiring-only + fragment rule (witness retro)
values.evidence: docs/docs/changelog.mdx (Teams/Zoom speaker bullets corrected to wiring-only)

values.title: fix(meeting-api): report every webhook delivery outcome — non-delivery was silent (#815)
fix(compose): first-run 'make all' — expand ${IMAGE_TAG} in BROWSER_IMAGE before the spawn-image pull (#812)
fix(config): a wrong STT URL or token is caught where you set it, not by an empty transcript (#511)
fix(lifecycle): a bot that was never admitted is not a completed meeting (#807)
values.pass: a bot that never reaches the meeting resolves terminal as failed/join_failure, never completed
values.observation: Storm 2026-07-19 ~20:15 UTC: staging bots 13530/13531 spawned into unadmittable google_meet URLs → meetings resolved status=failed, completion_reason=join_failure (DB-observed), NOT completed. Separately, 21 over-capacity meetings whose bot pods never scheduled all converged requested→failed via reconcile_stale_nonterminal_sweep within ~4 min.

values.title: fix(meeting-api): answer /bots/status from the query, not from the whole account (#803)
values.pass: /bots/status answers from a slim query projection, not the whole account's data blobs
values.observation: Storm 2026-07-19: GET /bots/status on staging returned a slim projection — 978 bytes for a 5-bot account in 0.73s, items carry id/user_id/platform/native_meeting_id only, no heavy data blob.

values.title: fix(join): Zoom/Teams admission verdicts are typed — permanent failures stop being retried (#806)
values.pass: a permanent admission failure is classified typed and not retried into a false completed
values.observation: Storm 2026-07-19: the never-admitted staging bots carried a typed join_failure attribution (the #806 taxonomy) and were classified permanent — resolved failed, not retried into a completed.

values.title: feat(deploy): the deprecated 0.10 dashboard gets a bounded, off-by-default home (#813)
values.evidence: deploy/helm/tests/test_template.sh (dashboard absent by default / dashboard.enabled assertions)

values.title: fix(bot-spawn,join): browser_session refuses typed at intake; unknown platforms refuse in the join layer (#816)
values.pass: browser_session and unknown platforms are refused with a typed 422 at intake, never a 500 or orphan
values.observation: Storm 2026-07-19: POST /bots {platform:browser_session} → HTTP 422 typed; {platform:skype} → HTTP 422 typed. No 5xx, no orphan meeting row created.

values.title: feat(bot): record-always at the capture boundary — captured-signal.v1 recorder, hint capture, STT tap, distiller (#830)
fix(config): an exhausted STT token probes RED — the preflight transcribes real audio (#511 follow-up)
